calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-03-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Department 501 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Karen Y. Uchiyama, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff AGP 815 O'FARRELL, LLC
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Vignesh Shanmugam
Angel Poli sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1. Residential Rental Agreement Id/Evid.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 2. Three Day Notice to Quit. Id/Evid.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 3. Resident Ledger Id/Evid.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant:
Principal $1943.71 Rent Owed
Holdover Damages 3040.00
Total Judgment 4983.71
Lease Forefeited
Counsel to submit Memorandum of costs at a later date.
No Attorney's Fee's.
Exhibits retained court file.
Judgment signed in court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-03-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff AGP 815 O'Farrell LLC is present. Represented by Angel Poli.
Attorney Aaron Farmer for the plaintiff.
Defendant Vignesh Shanmugam DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of JUN-03-2013 remains on calendar. (D501)
